branch.name: main
branch.latest_commit: ef6ef3eb BIG-GO-1352: harden tests python-free baseline

commands: find tests src/bigclaw scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1352 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty `tests/*.py` inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `f8cbae1c`.
Direct push to `origin/main` raced with other unattended lanes, so the published remote branch for this lane is `origin/BIG-GO-1352`.
